message:
feat: add 'bd note' command as shorthand for appending notes

Adds 'bd note <id> [text...]' as a first-class command for the common
operation of appending notes to a bead. Supports positional args, --stdin,
and --file input. Addresses desire-path from agents using 'bd note' naturally.

Closes: gt-xbf2

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
